category_sources: Official STP homepage describes STP as a constraint solver for quantifier-free bitvectors used by program analysis tools, theorem provers, bug finders, fuzzers, and model checkers.
source_facts.description says STP is a Simple Theorem Prover and efficient SMT solver for bitvectors.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is STP / The Simple Theorem Prover.
docs_sources: Official STP GitHub README is also an official documentation surface.
Official STP homepage links to stp.readthedocs.io as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has the official repository URL https://github.com/stp/stp, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official STP homepage describes constraint solving for bitvectors, program analysis, theorem proving, bug finding, fuzzing, and model checking.
source_facts.description identifies an SMT solver for bitvectors.
